name: Garlic-Ginger Chicken with Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs. sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/4-inch medallions
3 1/2 lbs. fryer chicken, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly combine the soy sauce, sherry, brown sugar, and ginger.
2. Pour the mixture over the potatoes and chicken in a baking dish.
3. Cover and marinate for 1 hour.
4. Turn the chicken and potatoes; marinate an additional hour.
5. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
6. Bake for 25 minutes. Turn the potatoes and chicken; baste.
7. Continue baking for another 30 minutes, or until no pink remains when the chicken is poked with a fork.
8. Remove the dish from the oven. Arrange the potatoes around the chicken on a serving dish.
9. If desired, serve over rice. Sprinkle green onions for garnish.
